title: Mutating Func
description: Write methods that can modify the internal properties of a struct by using the mutating keyword.
problemStatement:
Change from within! Define a struct `Point` with `x` and `y` coordinates. Create a method `moveBy(dx:dy:)` that updates the coordinates.

**Requirement:** You MUST use the `mutating` keyword for the method to modify the struct's own properties.
hints: Structs are value types, so methods need explicit permission to change their own data.
